profile.name: Grizzly Pradipta Singhasana Enshito
profile.title: AI-Assisted Data & Location Intelligence
profile.tagline: AI-Assisted Data • Location Intelligence • Vibe Coding Learner
profile.headline: I turn messy operational data into clearer insights, better workflows, and practical AI-assisted solutions.
profile.summary: I have experience in POI analysis, map data quality, routing issue investigation, geospatial data, and operational problem solving. Previously at Grab, I supported location-based services by validating real-world data, analyzing driver reports, identifying incorrect POI attributes, and collaborating with Product, Engineering, Operations, and external map providers.
profile.contactHeadline: Interested in data, AI-assisted workflows, and practical digital product development.
profile.contactText: I am open to roles in Vibe Coding, Data Analyst, Location Intelligence, Technical Operations, and AI-assisted internal tools development.

metrics.label: Years in data, GIS & operations
metrics.description: From geospatial database work to platform-level map data quality.

metrics.label: Main domain
metrics.description: Location data, routing issue analysis, and map quality validation.

metrics.label: Current transition
metrics.description: GenAI, LLM, agents, RAG, Python, and vibe coding learning track.

roleFit.title: Vibe Coding
roleFit.description: I am expanding into AI-assisted development through GenAI, LLMs, agents, RAG, Python, machine learning fundamentals, and spec-driven development. My strength is translating real operational problems into clear logic and practical workflows.

roleFit.title: Data Analyst
roleFit.description: I have hands-on experience working with messy operational data, POI quality, root-cause analysis, classification logic, issue trend reporting, and cross-functional data validation.

roleFit.title: Web Dev-adjacent
roleFit.description: I am not positioning myself as a senior web developer yet, but I am building toward AI-assisted web and internal tools development, especially for dashboards, forms, data validation, and simple workflow tools.

projects.title: PAC-MAN — POI Category & Business Type Detection
projects.description: Built and contributed to an internal data quality project used to detect POI category and business type from POI names and identify incorrect POI attributes. The project supported POI validation, classification logic, and map data quality improvement.
projects.tools: Classification Logic, POI Validation, Data Quality

projects.title: Audio Protect Dataset Support
projects.description: Prepared and categorized sample abusive words for Grab’s Audio Protect feature development. The work supported language pattern identification, feature testing, and safety-related data preparation.
projects.tools: Dataset Preparation, Language Pattern, Feature Testing

projects.title: AI & Vibe Coding Learning Projects
projects.description: Completed internal and external learning in GenAI, LLMs, AI agents, RAG, vibe coding, Python, machine learning fundamentals, deep learning fundamentals, and spec-driven development through Grab internal AI training and AWS/Dicoding programs.

experience.bullets: Analyzed POI, routing, and map data quality issues across Indonesia.|Investigated driver-submitted voice reports to identify POI inaccuracies, incorrect attributes, map gaps, or routing logic issues.|Collaborated with Driver-Partners, Product, Engineering, Operations, and external map providers.|Prepared map accuracy and issue trend reports to support operational decision-making.

Processed Landsat 8 imagery using ArcMap and supervised classification methods.|Prepared and organized spatial data from multiple research teams for server integration.|Supported technical setup for GIS workstations, servers, and research tools.

Processed flood data with HEC-GeoRAS and HEC-RAS.|Managed survey planning and data preparation for Grab Street View projects.|Used QGIS and Python-based scripts to support photo cleaning, migration, and deliverable workflows.

skills.items: Data cleaning, validation, root-cause analysis, classification logic, reporting, POI analysis, Google Sheets, Excel, Looker Studio
GenAI fundamentals, LLM concepts, AI agents, RAG fundamentals, prompt-based development, spec-driven development
Basic Python, data processing scripts, file migration automation, beginner-level automation workflow, technical documentation
ArcGIS, QGIS, ENVI, spatial analysis, POI validation, routing issue analysis, geospatial database, field survey, remote sensing

certifications.name: Belajar Dasar Cloud dan Gen AI di AWS
